title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!
